overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The scene features neon-lit streets, futuristic architecture, moderate vehicle traffic, and pedestrians with umbrellas. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

segments.scene_description: Turning right from the covered sidewalk into a wide open intersection. The camera crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk as vehicles drive through. The tall glass tower with the red billboard is now visible to the left.

segments.scene_description: Entering an urban plaza featuring a prominent outdoor stairs structure with red steps on the right. The building facade ahead glows with pink neon light. A group of pedestrians with umbrellas waits at the crosswalk as vehicles pass by.

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide intersection into an area with tall palm trees lining the street. A massive digital billboard displays GET AN UPGRADE in yellow letters. A futuristic flying vehicle hovers in the distance above the buildings.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane street lined with buildings featuring prominent vertical purple neon pillars. A concrete road barrier runs along the right side. The wet road continues to reflect the neon lights from the surrounding advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk city, moving from a sheltered sidewalk into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban center. It begins along a covered walkway beside a concrete building, following a pedestrian with an umbrella across wet, reflective asphalt as the camera turns right into a wide intersection dominated by a glass tower and a red billboard. The scene then expands along a multi-lane street where a dark SUV passes by, leading toward an urban plaza characterized by red stairs and a building facade glowing with pink neon light. As the camera crosses another wide intersection, the environment shifts to include tall palm trees and a massive yellow digital billboard reading GET AN UPGRADE, while a futuristic vehicle hovers in the distance. Finally, the path continues along a road lined with concrete barriers and buildings featuring vertical purple neon pillars that shimmer on the rain-slicked pavement.
